title: Elementals
description: Use bending just like in avatar!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40535a765e8daaae0f55b57332a5a3b58fc8a742.png)
# What's this mod?
This mod allows you to master the 4 elements from avatar. My main focus is to make each element useful both in *and* out of combat. The main goal when designing this mod was to make bending feel natural.

## Features

<details>
  
<summary>What elements are in this mod? </summary>
  
There are 4 main elements, from which sub-elements stem from. Each of them has *at least* 12 abilities.
- Air
- Water
- Earth
- Fire

There is also a few sub-elements in the mod, with more to come in the future.
- Lightning
- Blood

</details>


<details>
  
<summary>What else can I expect in this mod? </summary>
  
- A skill tree to level your way through in survival (Open with the minus key)
- Frequent updates to the content of the mod
- Dyable & Enchantable Water pouches 
- Boomerangs!
- More sub-bendings and content in the future

</details>

## What's unique about this mod?
Casting abilities is what sets this mod apart along with a more minecrafty feel. The conditions in which you press a keybind affects what's being done. For example, sneaking when casting will make something different than if you did not.

The goal of this was to give the feeling of bending being an extension and a natural part of yourself.

## Resources & Help
In case you find yourself in need of assistance, you can either read the [FAQ](https://github.com/saperate/Elementals/wiki/FAQ), the [getting started guide](https://github.com/saperate/Elementals/wiki/Getting-started), or join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/r7bmTPr7j3) to ask your question!

> If you want to stay up to date with the mod, suggest some features or submit bug reports, I highly recommend that you do it over at my [discord](https://discord.gg/r7bmTPr7j3)!
